user_prompt: Consecrate the heat sink before activation
prayer:
Approach the heat sink with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the heat sink's vanes with sacred unguents, purifying conduits for thermal fury.
Chant the Litany of Dissipation whilst aligning its exchangers for activation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the heat sink to embrace activation, ensuring unyielding coolant flow.
Sanctify the rite with incense, affirming the Omnissiah's divine equilibrium.
